text:
NAME: PRVDR_NUM_ISSG_ENT_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
18 
FILE(S): 
APR Identifiers 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string (e.g., 01, CMS, NPI, DEA, IRS), or Null/missing; type of value depends on 
the PRVDR_NUM_SYS. 
COMMENT: 
The values in this field depend on the Provider Number System/Nomenclature used: 
If PRVDR_NUM_SYS equals “1” (State-specific Medicaid Provider ID), then this value is the ANSI state 
numeric code (e.g., 04,17,33,48). 
If PRVDR_NUM_SYS
